---
title: "Contact"
---

```{=html}

<!-- ====== CONTACT HERO ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal"> 
<section class="page-section">
<div class="container">
<div class="row justify-content-center">
<div class="col-lg-8">

<div class="contact-section" style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
<h1 style="font-family: var(--om-font-heading); font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: .5rem; position: relative; z-index: 1;">
Let's Work Together
</h1>
<p style="font-size: 1.15rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.85); max-width: 550px; margin: 0 auto 2rem; line-height: 1.7; position: relative; z-index: 1;">
Available for data science, actuarial consulting, statistical research, and collaborative opportunities.
</p>

<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row justify-content-center gap-3 mb-4" style="position: relative; z-index: 1;">
<a href="mailto:mofokengodey@gmail.com" class="contact-btn contact-btn-white">
<i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> mofokengodey@gmail.com
</a>
<a href="tel:+27639633131" class="contact-btn contact-btn-outline">
<i class="fas fa-phone"></i> +27 63 963 3131
</a>
</div>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-4" style="position: relative; z-index: 1;">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/odey-mofokeng-94b043238/" target="_blank" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: white;"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i></a>
<a href="https://github.com/odeymofokeng-wits" target="_blank" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: white;"><i class="fab fa-github"></i></a>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Contact Details Cards -->
<div class="row g-4">

<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="stat-card" style="text-align: left; padding: 2rem;">
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
<div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(30,58,138,.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<i class="fas fa-envelope" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--om-primary);"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0;">Email</h4>
<p style="font-size: .9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Preferred contact method</p>
</div>
</div>
<a href="mailto:mofokengodey@gmail.com" style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--om-primary); text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem;">mofokengodey@gmail.com</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="stat-card" style="text-align: left; padding: 2rem;">
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
<div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(5,150,105,.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<i class="fas fa-phone" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: #059669;"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0;">Phone</h4>
<p style="font-size: .9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Available during business hours</p>
</div>
</div>
<a href="tel:+27639633131" style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--om-primary); text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem;">+27 63 963 3131</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="stat-card" style="text-align: left; padding: 2rem;">
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
<div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(59,130,246,.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<i class="fab fa-linkedin" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: #3b82f6;"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0;">LinkedIn</h4>
<p style="font-size: .9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Professional network & updates</p>
</div>
</div>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/odey-mofokeng-94b043238/" target="_blank" style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--om-primary); text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem;">Odey Mofokeng</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-6">
<div class="stat-card" style="text-align: left; padding: 2rem;">
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
<div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(124,58,237,.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<i class="fab fa-github" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: #7c3aed;"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0;">GitHub</h4>
<p style="font-size: .9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Code repositories & portfolio</p>
</div>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/odeymofokeng-wits" target="_blank" style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--om-primary); text-decoration: none; font-size: .95rem;">odeymofokeng-wits</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-12">
<div class="stat-card" style="text-align: left; padding: 2rem;">
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
<div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(245,158,11,.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
<i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt" style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: #f59e0b;"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; margin: 0;">Location</h4>
<p style="font-size: .9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Based in Gauteng, South Africa</p>
</div>
</div>
<span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--om-primary); font-size: .95rem;">Lenasia South, Gauteng, South Africa</span>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- What I'm Looking For -->
<div class="mt-5" style="background: white; border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.12); border-radius: var(--om-radius-lg); padding: 2.5rem;">
<h3 style="font-family: var(--om-font-heading); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">
What I'm Looking For
</h3>
<p style="color: #475569; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
I am actively seeking opportunities that leverage my combined expertise in actuarial science and 
mathematical statistics. Whether it is a full-time role, a consulting engagement, or a research 
collaboration, I am eager to apply my quantitative skills to challenging, real-world problems.
</p>

<div class="row g-3">
<div class="col-md-4">
<div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: .75rem; padding: 1.25rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="fas fa-chart-bar" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--om-primary); margin-bottom: .5rem;"></i>
<h5 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 .25rem;">Data Science</h5>
<p style="font-size: .8rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Predictive modelling, spatial analysis, ML</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-md-4">
<div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: .75rem; padding: 1.25rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="fas fa-calculator" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--om-secondary); margin-bottom: .5rem;"></i>
<h5 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 .25rem;">Actuarial Consulting</h5>
<p style="font-size: .8rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Reserving, pricing, risk modelling</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-md-4">
<div style="background: #f8fafc; border-radius: .75rem; padding: 1.25rem; text-align: center;">
<i class="fas fa-flask" style="font-size: 1.5rem; color: #7c3aed; margin-bottom: .5rem;"></i>
<h5 style="font-family: var(--om-font-body); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 .25rem;">Statistical Research</h5>
<p style="font-size: .8rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0;">Geostatistics, biostatistics, methodology</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
```
